gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/65)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/65)
text: قُلْتُ لَهُ مَا يَرْوِي النَّاسُ فِي أَكْلِ الطِّينِ وَ كَرَاهِيَتِهِ فَقَالَ إِنَّمَا ذَاكَ الْمَبْلُولُ وَ ذَاكَ الْمَدَرُ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Moamar Bin Khallad,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Al Hassan<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘What are the people reporting regarding eating the clay and its abhorrence?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘But rather, that is the wet and the loam’.
en.sarwar: 7. Ahmad ibn Muhammad has narrated from Mu’ammar ibn Khallad who has said the following: “I once asked abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about what people narrate as regards eating clay and that it is undesirable. He (the Imam) said, ‘It is clay and chunks of dirt.’”
